text:

Hello.

I found newer version 0.2.4 is already released after sending
PR. Attached patch is diff from previous one. So would you please
commit this one too?

Regards.

----Next_Part(Sat_Feb_23_11_10_46_2008_602)--

-PORTVERSION=	0.2.3
